ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude code and codex for free in the terminal, VSCode extension, and discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lightricks/LTX-2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2
Language: python
Official Python inference and LoRA trainer package for the LTX-2 audio–video generative model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: THUDM/slime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/THUDM/slime
Language: python
slime is an LLM post-training framework for RL Scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chopratejas/headroom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
Language: python
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-research/timesfm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-research/timesfm
Language: python
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: home-assistant/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/home-assistant/core
Language: python
🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/presidio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/presidio
Language: python
An open-source framework for detecting, redacting, masking, and anonymizing sensitive data (PII) across text, images, and structured data. Supports NLP, pattern matching, and customizable pipelines.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mikumifa/biliTickerBuy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mikumifa/biliTickerBuy
Language: python
b站会员购购票辅助工具

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
Language: python
754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: onyx-dot-app/onyx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/onyx-dot-app/onyx
Language: python
Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

A collective list of free APIs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stanford-oval/storm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stanford-oval/storm
Language: python
An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/unsloth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
Language: python
Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Gemma 4, Qwen3.6, DeepSeek, gpt-oss locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zubair-trabzada/geo-seo-claude
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zubair-trabzada/geo-seo-claude
Language: python
GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code. Comprehensive AI search optimization for any website — citability scoring, AI crawler analysis, brand authority, schema markup, platform-specific optimization, and PDF reports. If you want learn how to sell this to real businesses, check out the skool community
